raw_text: Maintenance Planner – Iron Ore | BHP, Newman WA | FIFO 8/6 ex-Perth. BHP is hiring 12 maintenance planners across the Pilbara to support shutdown execution at Newman, Jimblebar and Yandi. Strong CMMS (1SAP / Maximo) experience required. Permanent. Immediate start.

Reliability Engineer – Fixed Plant | BHP Olympic Dam, SA | Residential Roxby Downs. Multiple openings (x6) supporting copper concentrator reliability uplift programme. Vibration analysis Cat III preferred.

Project Director – Jansen Stage 2 | BHP, Saskatchewan / Perth interface. BHP is mobilising the Stage 2 expansion of the Jansen potash project ($4.9bn capex). Seeking PD with mega-project EPCM oversight experience.

Vice President, Decarbonisation Programs | BHP Group, Melbourne. Newly created executive role reporting to the Chief Sustainability Officer. Lead BHP's Scope 1+2 abatement portfolio across iron ore and copper assets.
Mobile Plant Fitters x20 – Pilbara Iron Ore | Rio Tinto, Karratha & Tom Price. Bulk recruitment campaign across Brockman, Yandicoogina and Hope Downs sites. FIFO 2/1 from Perth/Brisbane/Cairns.
Production Superintendent – Bauxite | Rio Tinto, Weipa QLD. Permanent residential. Lead production crews across mining and beneficiation. SSE certification mandatory.
Construction Manager – Western Range Project | Rio Tinto Iron Ore, Pilbara. Greenfield 25Mtpa replacement mine, $2bn investment. Seeking CM for civil/SMP package execution. 4/3 FIFO ex-Perth.

Workforce Strategy Lead – AU Critical Minerals | Rio Tinto, Perth. Build labour-market intelligence and supply forecasts for lithium, scandium and rare earths growth pipeline. Strategy / consulting background preferred.
Process Operators x15 – Lihir Gold | Newmont, Lihir Island PNG. FIFO ex-Cairns/POM 4/4 roster. Refractory ore processing experience advantageous. Apply through Newmont Careers.
Senior Metallurgist – Autoclave Operations | Newmont Lihir, PNG. Lead pressure-oxidation circuit performance optimisation. Min 8 yrs gold processing experience.
Project Manager – Lihir Phase 14A Pre-Strip | Newmont Mining, Lihir PNG. New waste-stripping campaign to extend mine life to 2040. Seeking PM with open-pit mining execution background.
General Manager – Lihir Operations | Newmont Corporation, PNG. Newly vacated executive seat following internal transfer. Site GM oversees ~3,500 personnel and full P&L.
Underground Shift Supervisors x8 | Barrick Niugini Ltd, Porgera Gold Mine PNG. Restart hiring continues post 2024 reopening. Open-stoping experience required. Residential camp.
Mine Geologist – Porgera | Barrick Gold, PNG. Resource definition and grade-control geology. Leapfrog Geo + Surpac essential.
EPCM Construction Lead – Porgera Tailings Storage Upgrade | Barrick / Porgera Joint Venture. New TSF stage 7 raise; $180m capex. Civil/geotechnical construction lead with PNG remote-site experience.
Lead Process Engineer – Papua LNG | TotalEnergies EP PNG, Port Moresby. Joining the Papua LNG Train 3+4 development team in advance of FID. Onshore liquefaction process design.
Project Controls Manager – Papua LNG Upstream | TotalEnergies, POM/Brisbane. Build cost & schedule baselines for upstream wellpads + flowlines scope. Primavera P6 mandatory.
HSE Advisors x4 – Papua LNG | TotalEnergies, multiple PNG sites. Field HSE coverage during pre-FEED site investigations. ICAM lead investigator certification preferred.
Production Operators x10 – PNG LNG | ExxonMobil PNG (EMPNG), Hides Gas Conditioning Plant. Permanent residential rotational. DCS Honeywell experience advantageous.
Mechanical Maintenance Technicians x6 – PNG LNG Plant | EMPNG (ExxonMobil), Caution Bay. Rotating equipment experience on gas turbines and centrifugal compressors essential.
Country Manager – Papua New Guinea | ExxonMobil, Port Moresby. Senior leadership role overseeing all PNG upstream + LNG operations. Replacing outgoing Country Manager who is moving to USA HQ.
Coal Handling Plant Operators x12 | Glencore Coal, Hunter Valley NSW. Multiple permanent residential roles at Mt Owen and Bulga complexes. CHPP experience preferred.
Senior Mining Engineer – Mount Isa Copper | Glencore, Mount Isa QLD. Sublevel cave mine planning and short-term scheduling. XPAC and Datamine essential.

Head of Investor Relations – APAC | Glencore Plc, Sydney. Newly created role following expanded Asia-Pacific reporting line; supports Glencore's growing copper exposure narrative for institutional investors.
Maintenance Supervisors x5 – Mining Services | Downer Group, Bowen Basin QLD. FIFO 2/1 ex-Brisbane. Crew leadership across HME fleet (793F, EX5600).
Civil Foremen x4 | Downer EDI Works, Western Sydney. Roads & motorways business unit; M7 widening package. Trade-qualified with civil supervisory experience.
Project Manager – Suburban Rail Loop East | Downer, Melbourne. Mobilising for the SRL East tunnels & stations package awarded to the Downer-led consortium. Major projects rail experience required.
Boilermakers x10 – Shutdown Crew | Monadelphous, Karratha WA. FIFO 3/1 ex-Perth supporting Q3 LNG turnaround. Coded welders preferred (6G).
Riggers + Scaffolders x15 | Monadelphous Group, Pluto LNG Karratha. Major maintenance event. Advanced rigging tickets essential.
Construction Manager – West Musgrave | Monadelphous, WA. Mobilising for SMP/E&I package on the West Musgrave nickel-copper project. FIFO ex-Perth.
Heavy Diesel Fitters x8 | Ok Tedi Mining Limited (OTML), Tabubil PNG. Permanent residential. Cat 793 / Komatsu 930E fleet maintenance.
Process Plant Operators x6 | Ok Tedi Mining, Tabubil. Copper concentrator panel and field operator roles. PNG citizens preferred.
Chief Operating Officer | OTML (Ok Tedi Mining Limited), Port Moresby. Board-appointed COO succession; prior incumbent retiring after 7-year tenure.
Mining Engineer – Long-Term Planning | Vale Australia, Perth. Supports nickel-business strategic planning across Indonesia and PNG growth options. Whittle / XPAC essential.
Project Director – Indonesia Nickel HPAL Joint Venture | Vale S.A., Jakarta/Brisbane. Leading the JV with a Chinese partner on a new $2bn HPAL nickel processing facility.
Plant Manager – Weda Bay Nickel | Eramet Group, Indonesia (rotation ex-Perth). Lead nickel pig iron / mixed hydroxide processing operations. French language a plus.
Project Engineer – Centenario FPSO Tie-back | Eramet SA / partners (offshore Brazil scope). Senior Project Engineer to support topside modifications. Houston/Perth basing.
Subsea Construction Engineer | Saipem S.p.A., Perth WA. Joining the offshore execution team for Scarborough Trunkline tie-in scope. SURF experience essential.
Welding Inspectors x4 | Saipem Australia, Perth + offshore. CSWIP 3.2 / AWS CWI required. Roster TBC.
Senior Process Engineer – LNG | TechnipEnergies, Perth. Supporting front-end engineering for North West Shelf backfill studies. PRO/II + HYSYS modelling.
Piping Designers x6 | TechnipFMC, Perth. Long-term contract roles supporting subsea production system design. PDMS/E3D required.
Subsea Project Engineers x3 | Subsea7 Australia, Perth WA. Permanent positions on Browse Basin development. Pipeline installation engineering background.
Installation Manager – Jansz-Io Compression Project | Subsea 7, Perth. Mobilising team for offshore execution phase. SURF + heavy-lift coordination required.
Senior Engineering Geologist | Aurecon, Brisbane. Supporting tunnelling and dam-safety projects across QLD and PNG. Chartered status preferred.
Bid Director – Major Infrastructure ANZ | Vinci Construction, Sydney. Leading consortium pursuit for upcoming Sydney Metro West tunnels package.
Systems Engineer – Naval Combat Systems | Thales Australia, Garden Island NSW. Supporting Hunter-class frigate combat-system integration programme. AGSVA NV1 required.
Avionics Test Engineer | Safran Group, Brisbane. Supporting the MRH-90 / NH90 helicopter sustainment programme transition. Defence clearance pathway available.
Tunnelling Engineer – HS2 / Civil Works | Eiffage Construction, Paris/London + remote AU support. Senior engineer for ongoing European mega-tunnel works; sponsorship considered.

Hotel Concierge – 5-Star Resort | Coral Sands Resort, Cairns QLD. Permanent full-time concierge for our luxury beachfront property. Hospitality diploma preferred. Excellent guest-facing communication essential.
Marketing Manager – ANZ Beverages | Sunshine Drinks Co., Sydney. Lead consumer marketing for our flagship juice brand. 7+ yrs FMCG experience required. Strong digital + influencer campaign portfolio.
Junior Accountant | Riverside Community Bank, Wagga Wagga NSW. Entry-level role in our SME lending back office. CA/CPA pathway support provided.
Retail Merchandiser – Apparel | Coastline Fashion Group, Melbourne. Visual merchandising lead for 14 stores across Victoria. Apparel retail experience required.
Customer Service Representative – Inbound Call Centre | TelcoOne Pty Ltd, Adelaide. Permanent shift-based role in our consumer mobile contact centre. No prior experience required.
Registered Nurse – Aged Care | Eldergrace Living, Brisbane North. Permanent part-time RN for residential aged-care facility. AHPRA registration required.
Primary School Teacher | St Catherine's Catholic College, Toowoomba QLD. Year 3 classroom teacher commencing Term 1. Bachelor of Education + QCT registration required.
Cafe Barista – Inner West | The Daily Grind Espresso Bar, Sydney. Casual barista wanted for busy specialty-coffee venue. 2+ yrs experience on La Marzocco preferred.
Social Media Coordinator | Bright & Co. Digital Agency, Melbourne. Lead organic content + community management for 6 lifestyle clients. Reels + TikTok native essential.
Veterinary Receptionist | Pawsome Pet Clinic, Hobart TAS. Front-desk role at busy small-animal practice. Cert III in Animal Studies a plus.
Travel Consultant – International | Wanderlux Travel, Perth. Permanent consultant role specialising in luxury European cruises. Sabre / Galileo training provided.
Personal Trainer – Group Fitness | FitNation Gyms, Canberra. Permanent PT role with group HIIT classes 4 days/week. Cert IV Fitness required.
Real Estate Sales Agent | Harborview Realty, Newcastle NSW. Residential sales agent role at boutique agency. Existing rent-roll a plus. Class 2 license required.
Bookkeeper – Part Time | Fennel & Fig Bakery, Geelong VIC. 2 days/week, MYOB + Xero. Friendly small business needs reliable BAS-agent-supervised bookkeeper.
Florist Designer | Petals & Stems, Adelaide CBD. Wedding & event-focused florist. 3+ yrs floristry experience required.
Junior Graphic Designer | Vivid Print Studio, Brisbane. Junior designer role supporting print + packaging clients. Adobe CC + 1 yr experience.
Yoga Instructor – Vinyasa | Lotus Studio Bondi, Sydney. Casual instructor 4 evenings/week. RYT-200 minimum, RYT-500 preferred.
Childcare Educator – Diploma | Sunny Steps Early Learning, Logan QLD. Permanent room leader for 2-3 yr olds. Diploma in ECEC + WWCC required.
Wedding Planner – Senior | Forever Yours Events, Melbourne. Senior planner for high-end weddings 80-300 pax. 5 yrs events experience required.
Tax Accountant – Mid-Tier Firm | Whitestone Partners, Perth CBD. Senior tax accountant for SMSF + private-client portfolio. CA/CPA + 4 yrs PQE.

General Manager – Operations | BHP, Pilbara WA. Senior leadership opportunity. Reports to Asset President. The successful candidate will lead site operations across multiple Pilbara hubs. Defined annual STIP + LTIP.
General Manager – Operations | Premier Logistics Pty Ltd, Brisbane. Lead operational delivery for our national 3PL warehousing footprint. P&L of $90m. Logistics or supply-chain background required.

General Manager Operations – Mining Services | Confidential employer (large ASX-listed contract miner), Perth. Site-based GM opportunity in the Pilbara servicing a Tier 1 iron-ore client. P&L responsibility ~A$500m.

Senior Geologist – Resource Modelling | Newcrest Lihir Operations, PNG. Block-model maintenance for the Lihir gold deposit. Vulcan / Leapfrog essential. (Note: now operated by Newmont post-acquisition.)
Drill & Blast Engineer | Newmont Mining Corporation – Lihir Gold Mine, Niu Ailan PNG. Day-shift role designing production blasts. Must hold PNG Shotfirers ticket or willingness to obtain.

Maintenance Superintendent – Mobile Fleet | TechnipFMC (formerly Technip), Australia rotational basis. Lead the heavy-vehicle maintenance team supporting mobilisation across multiple LNG client sites.

Field Operator – Production | Lihir Gold Operations, PNG. Wokim long Lihir minim em wanpela bikpela chance. We are seeking experienced Field Operators to join our gold-processing crew. FIFO ex-POM/Cairns 4/4. Em i wanpela permanent role.

Wokman bilong Maintenance | Ok Tedi Mining Limited, Tabubil. OTML i laik kisim sampela nupela wokman long maintenance crew bilong mipela. Mechanical Fitter trade required, plus 3 yrs heavy-industry experience. Em i wanpela rotational residential role long Tabubil.

Reservoir Engineer | Kumul Petroleum Holdings Ltd, Port Moresby. Joining Kumul's growing upstream technical team supporting state participating interests in PNG LNG and Papua LNG. PNG state-owned operator.

Mine Geologist – Hidden Valley | Hidden Valley Joint Venture, Morobe Province PNG. Open-cut gold/silver operation seeking experienced geologist. FIFO Lae/POM rotation. Genuine career opportunity at a growing PNG operation.

Mine Planning Engineer | Coronado Global Resources, Bowen Basin QLD. Coronado's metallurgical-coal operations are expanding the Curragh complex. Seeking engineer with XPAC + MineScape. Permanent residential.

Senior Process Engineer – Lithium | Pilbara Minerals, Pilgangoora WA. Pilbara Minerals continues ramp-up of the P680 + P1000 expansion projects at Pilgangoora. Spodumene flotation circuit experience essential. FIFO ex-Perth.
